title: ortholotus rectus
side_effects: Ortholotus rectus can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and stomach cramps, due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's volatile oils can also lead to respiratory problems, including wheezing and shortness of breath. In some cases, improper use of Ortholotus rectus has been linked to allergic reactions, resulting in hives, itching, and swelling. Furthermore, excessive consumption of the plant has been known to cause neurological issues, including headaches, dizziness, and even seizures.
